title: prunus × simmleri
intro: Prunus × simmleri, also known as the Simmer's cherry, is a hybrid cherry species that is a cross between Prunus avium (wild cherry) and Prunus fruticosa (bitter cherry). The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Prunus × simmleri include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the digestive system. Herbal preparations of Prunus × simmleri include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
